# OpenFreeOCR

OpenFreeOCR is a free online OCR tool at https://openfreeocr.online.

## What it does

- Converts images, photos, screenshots, receipts, notes, and scanned documents into copyable text.
- Supports upload, drag-and-drop, paste from clipboard, and batch OCR.
- Lets users group OCR output by word, sentence, or paragraph.
- Uses NVIDIA OCR through a server-side API relay.
- Does not store uploaded images or extracted text in OpenFreeOCR.

## Important URLs

- Home and OCR tool: https://openfreeocr.online/
- Privacy Policy: https://openfreeocr.online/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://openfreeocr.online/terms
- Sitemap: https://openfreeocr.online/sitemap.xml
- GitHub: https://github.com/davad00/OpenFreeOCR.Online

## Suggested description

OpenFreeOCR is a free, no-signup online OCR tool for extracting text from images, screenshots, photos, and scanned documents.
